notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the postgresql SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.8. It addresses 4 CVEs: CVE-2023-39417, CVE-2024-10976, CVE-2024-10978, CVE-2024-10979.
notes.title: Description
